name: mycelium_steam_list_assets
description: List Steam asset generation jobs (store copy, screenshots, trailers).

name: mycelium_steam_get_asset
description: Get details of a Steam asset including drone job status.

name: mycelium_steam_store_copy
description: Generate a Steam store page BBCode prompt. Returns a structured prompt to send to Claude API for BBCode store copy generation.

game_facts.description: Override game facts (title, genre, core_loop, loot, pvp, etc.)

sections.description: Sections to generate (short_description, about, features, tags)

name: mycelium_steam_screenshots
description: Submit a drone job to extract and curate Steam screenshots from gameplay footage. Uses Claude Vision to score frames and selects diverse set across categories.

footage_url.description: URL or path to gameplay footage

categories.description: Screenshot categories for diversity (default: combat, loot, builds, pvp, exploration, ui)

name: mycelium_steam_trailer
description: Submit a drone job to build a segmented Steam trailer from gameplay footage. Segments: intro, gameplay, combat/loot, stakes, journey, outro — with character narration and title cards.

footage_url.description: URL or path to gameplay footage

video_session_id.description: Link to a video pipeline session for highlight clips
